meta.title: 5 Days Kashmir Paradise + Delhi Shopping from Malaysia | Dhesu Travel & Tours
meta.description: 5-day Kashmir and Delhi tour with Dal Lake houseboat, Mughal gardens, Delhi sightseeing and shopping, domestic flight included. From RM2588 per person.
meta.keywords: 5 Days Kashmir Paradise + Delhi Shopping from Malaysia, India tour package, Kashmir tour package Malaysia, Dhesu travel

hero.title: 5 Days, Kashmir & Delhi.
hero.titleAccent: The Valley of Paradise and a Capital Shopping Spree.
hero.intro: Pair the serene beauty of the Kashmir valley with the buzz of Delhi. Dal Lake, Mughal gardens and mountain meadows, then the markets, monuments and shopping of the Indian capital. Nature and city in one trip.
hero.heroImageAlt: Kashmir Dal Lake and Delhi combination tour

overview.heading: 5 Days Kashmir Paradise + Delhi Shopping: The Full Picture
body: This trip combines two very different sides of North India: the tranquil paradise of Kashmir and the energetic capital, Delhi. You experience Srinagar's Dal Lake, houseboats and Mughal gardens, then fly to Delhi for sightseeing and some of the best shopping in the country.

Arranged privately from Malaysia, this 5 day Kashmir and Delhi package includes the domestic flight between the two, with your own vehicle and driver guide at each end. It is ideal for travellers who want natural beauty and city life, plus time to shop for Kashmiri handicrafts and Delhi's bazaars.

highlights.heading: Why Travellers from Malaysia Love This Trip

items.title: Kashmir's Dal Lake & Gardens
items.body: A houseboat night, a shikara ride, and the Mughal gardens of Srinagar, all framed by snow-capped peaks. The serene heart of any Kashmir visit.

items.title: Delhi's Monuments & Markets
items.body: From the spice lanes of Chandni Chowk to India Gate and the grand Mughal monuments, Delhi packs history and energy into every corner.

items.title: Shopping: Kashmir to Delhi
items.body: Kashmiri pashminas, carpets, walnut wood and saffron in Srinagar, then the bazaars of Delhi for textiles, handicrafts and more. A shopper's dream pairing.

days.title: Arrive Srinagar, Houseboat
days.description: Met at Srinagar airport and transferred to your Dal Lake houseboat. Evening shikara ride.

days.title: Srinagar Sightseeing
days.description: Mughal gardens, old city and a mountain excursion option.

days.title: Fly Srinagar to Delhi
days.description: Domestic flight to Delhi, with afternoon sightseeing in the capital.

days.title: Delhi Sightseeing & Shopping
days.description: Old and New Delhi, with plenty of time for shopping.

days.title: Depart Delhi
days.description: Checkout and transfer to the airport for your onward flight.

hotelOptions.heading: Choose Your Comfort Level
hotelOptions.subheading: Centrally located hotels with easy access to the main sights. Pick the tier that suits your style.

whyBook.heading: Two Worlds, One Smooth Trip
whyBook.body: Combining Kashmir and Delhi means coordinating a domestic flight and two very different destinations. We handle the flight, the transfers and the local arrangements at each end. Dhesu has arranged North India tours for over 35 years.

points.title: MATTA & IATA Registered
points.body: Fully licensed Malaysian travel agency. We guide you through India e-Visa documentation with every booking.

points.title: Private Tours, Daily Departures
points.body: No minimum group to wait for. Your trip runs on your dates, your pace, your own vehicle and guide.

points.title: A Real Team to Call
points.body: Reachable throughout your trip. Flight delayed, your guide waits. Plans change, we adapt on the ground.

points.title: Group & Custom Pricing
points.body: Travelling as a family or group lowers the per-person cost. Ask us for a tailored quote.

sections.heading: Kashmir & Delhi Tour from Malaysia
sections.body:
This 5 day package is ideal for travellers who want the natural beauty of Kashmir and the energy and shopping of Delhi in one trip. The domestic flight links the two efficiently, so you experience paradise and the capital without a long overland journey.

Kashmir offers the lake, the gardens and the mountains; Delhi adds monuments, markets and some of India's best shopping.

A private vehicle and driver guide at each end keep the trip smooth and flexible.

sections.heading: Shopping in Kashmir and Delhi
sections.body:
Kashmir is famous for its handicrafts: pashmina shawls, hand-knotted carpets, walnut wood carving, papier-mache and saffron. Srinagar's showrooms and markets are the place to find them.

Delhi complements this with its bazaars and craft markets like Dilli Haat and Janpath, offering textiles, handicrafts and souvenirs from across India. Together they make a shopper's paradise.

items.question: Do Malaysians need a visa for India?
items.answer: Yes. Malaysian passport holders apply for an India e-Visa online before departure. The tourist e-Visa covers tourism and short visits and is valid for 30 days from entry. The application is on the official India e-Visa portal, and Dhesu walks you through it when you book. Visa fees are not included in the package price.

items.question: Which airport does this trip use?
items.answer: This is a land-only package: hotels, transfers, tours and guide are included, but international flights are not. Most Malaysian travellers fly from Kuala Lumpur International Airport (KLIA) to Srinagar and Delhi Airports (SXR / DEL). We can recommend suitable flights and timings on request.

items.question: Is the domestic flight included?
items.answer: Yes. This package includes the domestic flight between Srinagar and Delhi, so you do not face a long overland drive. International flights to and from India are not included.

items.question: What is the best time for this trip?
items.answer: April to October is ideal for Kashmir, with spring gardens, summer greenery and autumn colours. Delhi is most pleasant from October to March. Spring and autumn offer good weather in both, making them the best windows for the combined trip.

items.question: What can I buy in Kashmir?
items.answer: Kashmir is renowned for pashmina shawls, hand-knotted carpets, walnut wood carvings, papier-mache crafts and saffron. Srinagar has many reputable showrooms. Your guide can recommend trusted shops where you see the craftsmanship firsthand.
